name: Two-Step Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese and sugar in a large bowl with a wire whisk or electric mixer until smooth.
2. Gently stir in the whipped topping.
3. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
4. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until set.
5. Spread the pie filling evenly over the top of the cheesecake.
6. Store leftover cheesecake in the refrigerator.
